response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in distributed systems and diverse tech stacks. However, he lacks the executive leadership experience, team scaling history (10 to 30+ engineers), and deep production expertise in agentic AI and algorithmic fintech required for this CTO role. His background aligns much more closely with a Senior or Staff Individual Contributor role rather than an executive engineering leader.
strengths: Over 10 years of software engineering experience across varied domains, including open-source and commercial projects.
Proven experience with high-throughput microservices and distributed systems, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Completely lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and has no track record of scaling engineering organizations.
No demonstrated production experience architecting complex, stateful multi-agent AI systems for real-time decisioning.
Missing required domain expertise in algorithmic working-capital allocation, real-time credit risk, and fintech compliance.
